name: Animation
desc: Broadcasts entity animation (arm swing, damage, etc.) to nearby players.

implementation.overview: Broadcasts entity animations to all nearby players. Triggered by server processing C0APacketAnimation (swing), Entity.attackEntity (damage), or Entity.sleeping (leaveBed). CriticalHit modules send swing animations for visual crits.

modules.name: Criticals Animation (Rise 6.0)
modules.purpose: Read S0B with animation type 4 (critical) or 5 (magic critical) to detect when a critical hit registers.
